overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk along a wooden coastal pier. The player explores the upper observation deck, encounters an NPC taking photographs, views a passing sailboat, then returns to the main pier level walking toward shore with mountains and beach houses in the background.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on the lower wooden deck of a coastal pier, adjacent to a gray wooden building. The camera walks forward along the pier with white railings visible, overlooking the ocean to the right and the beach town to the left, then begins ascending stairs to an upper level around the 5-second mark.

segments.scene_description: On the upper observation deck, the camera explores around an octagonal building with a gravel surface underfoot. An NPC in an orange shirt stands near the railing using binoculars to view the ocean. The mountains are now visible to the left as the camera circles the structure.

descending stairs back to main pier level

segments.scene_description: From the corner of the upper deck, the camera observes a white sailboat with red hull passing by in the ocean below. After watching the boat, the camera descends stairs back to the main pier level, transitioning from the elevated observation area.

segments.scene_description: Walking along the main pier deck toward shore, passing through wooden gate structures. The pier features white benches and trash cans along both sides, with fishing equipment scattered on the deck. Fishermen stand by the railings, and the coastal town with mountains becomes more prominent ahead as the camera progresses.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal pier that ascends to an elevated observation deck before returning to the main walkway toward the shore. It begins on the lower wooden deck beside a gray building, moving forward past white railings with views of the ocean and a beach town before ascending a set of stairs. As the camera reaches the upper level, the scene shifts to a gravel-surfaced octagonal deck where an NPC in an orange shirt uses binoculars to scan the horizon against a backdrop of distant mountains. After pausing to observe a white sailboat with a red hull passing through the water below, the camera descends the stairs to transition back to the main pier level. The movement finally progresses toward the shore through wooden gates, passing white benches and fishermen with scattered equipment as the coastal town and mountains grow more prominent ahead.
